title: The Inference Engine
description: Use the clues to decide which ingredient reveals the most information when consulted in the Royal Society book.

hints.text: The Royal Society book reveals whether an ingredient's alchemical is Solar or Lunar. Consulting a confirmed ingredient gives no new information. The most useful choice is the ingredient whose Solar/Lunar nature is most uncertain — the one most evenly split between the two possibilities.

Still uncertain (Solar / Lunar candidates both possible):
  ing3: 5760 Solar / 7776 Lunar alchemicals still consistent ← most balanced
  ing4: 5328 Solar / 8208 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing5: 5328 Solar / 8208 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing7: 5328 Solar / 8208 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing8: 5328 Solar / 8208 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing1: 8640 Solar / 4896 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing2: 9216 Solar / 4320 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing6: 9216 Solar / 4320 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
Most informative ingredient to consult: ing3.
